description: Introduction to the fundamental principles and concepts of mineralogy and optical mineralogy. A practical and systematic treatment of the common rock-forming minerals and mineral groups. Emphasis is placed on understanding the behaviour of minerals in relation to changing physical and chemical conditions in igneous, metamorphic, and sedimentary environments.

groupFilter1.name: School of Earth and Ocean Sciences

preAndCorequisites:
• Complete all of the following
    • Complete all of:
      • EOS120 - The Dynamic Earth (1.5)
    • Complete all of:
      • CHEM102 - Chemical Reactivity Fundamentals with Environmental Applications (1.5)
title: Mineralogy
